name: v1_base3
why: the v1 mix (induct/execute/select) at r32/2ep — the reference point.

name: all6_even
why: does breadth across all six generic circuits lift more boats than three?

name: executable_heavy
why: C56 said an executable PROCEDURE installed and transferred; lean into execute/trace/verify, drop the hard induction wall.

name: induct_heavy
why: push the hardest circuit (composed-rule induction, the C39 wall) with high dose + a little scaffolding.

name: new3_only
why: the three new circuits alone — do trace/verify/count transfer independent of the v1 three?

name: all6_r16_lean
why: cheapest all-6 run (r16/1ep) — does dose/rank matter, or is the mix what moves transfer?
